content.text:
Introduction to Ancient Civilizations

Ancient civilizations were complex societies that developed writing, agriculture, government, and monumental architecture.

What You'll Learn:

  • Major ancient civilizations
  • Their contributions to modern society
  • Daily life in ancient times
  • Archaeological discoveries

Key Civilizations:

  • Mesopotamia - The cradle of civilization
  • Egypt - Pyramids and pharaohs
  • Greece - Democracy and philosophy
  • Rome - Law and engineering
content.task: Research one ancient civilization and list three of its major achievements
